chapter_title.ar: باب فَضْلِ ارْتِبَاطِ الْخَيْلِ وَ إِجْرَائِهَا وَ الرَّمْيِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – Merits of bridling the cavalry horses and injuring them, and the throwing (Archery)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/389)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/389)
text: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَجْرَى الْخَيْلَ وَ جَعَلَ سَبَقَهَا أَوَاقِيَّ مِنْ فِضَّةٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Giyad Bin Ibrahim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, from hisasws fatherasws, from Aliasws Bin Al-Husaynasws that Rasool-Allahsaww raced the cavalry horses, the first (prize) being an Awqiya (unit of measurement) of silver’.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ghiyath ibn Ibrahim from abu ‘ Abd Allah, from his father, from Ali ibn Al-Husayn, recipients of divine supreme covenant, who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, made the reward for horse to race for a contest in the form of Awaqiy (a certain weight) of silver.”
